title: Define ni v1 planning contract
reason: Task 027 dogfoods ni by replacing the prior v0-shaped locked plan with the v1 planning contract roadmap.
proposed_changes: Expand docs/plan to the v1 roadmap while preserving the ni-kernel boundary.
Add accepted contract traceability for product types, downstream targets, exports, feedback, pressure, harness candidates, amendment/relock, and collaboration checks.
Resolve obsolete non-blocking open questions so readiness can be determined by ni status without deferrals.
risk_impact: Adds explicit high-severity mitigations for export, feedback, pressure, harness, and relock boundary risks.
readiness_impact: Expected to keep ni status READY because all accepted capabilities map to requirements, evaluations, artifacts, and mitigated high-severity risks.
